reference: Hello. It is normal after surgery, including angioplasty and any other procedure, to have a reduced appetite for a few days to weeks. This is often due to stress and anxiety. Just encourage him to relax and live a normal life. Additionally, never stop medications even for a single day. The stent could become blocked, leading to another heart attack.
text: Hello. It is normal after surgery, including angioplasty and any other procedure, to have a reduced appetite for a few days to weeks. This is often due to stress and anxiety; just encourage him to relax and live a normal life. Additionally, never stop medications even for a single day; the stent could become blocked, leading to another heart attack.
